data.body: In the OpenRouter section of the settings sheet, add an 'Is This Secure?' link/button that opens a lightbox/dialog explaining: (1) how the API key is stored and protected, (2) what safety precautions are in place, (3) what risks remain unmitigated, and (4) recommendations for users (e.g. use a scoped key, rotate regularly). Should update as security posture improves.
data.title: Add 'Is This Secure?' lightbox to OpenRouter settings section
